name: UserDefinedElement
summary: The UserDefinedElement class represents a user-defined attribute specified by its name. A user-defined element is converted into a textual value before it is drawn.

constructors.name: UserDefinedElement
constructors.summary: Creates a new user-defined element instance with the given name.

constructors.name: UserDefinedElement
constructors.summary: Creates a new user-defined element instance with the given name and font.

methods.name: GetUnformattedString
methods.summary: Returns the content as a string without formatting.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

properties.name: Font
properties.summary: The font of the user-defined attribute.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: The name of the user-defined attribute.

properties.name: Unit
properties.summary: Gets or sets the unit attributes.

properties.name: Value
properties.summary: The value of the user-defined attribute.
